entry.title: Efficiency in development: Test Data in development client
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

I am a developer and often encounter a problem that slows down my development process: Bad or no test data in my development client. I would like to know how other companies do this.

The problem is related to our system landscape:

  • One development system (DEV) with client 100 for development and customizing and one client 101 with barely usable test data
  • One quality system (QUA) and of course one productive system (PRD)

For almost all development changes I make, I have to transport to QUA in order to test. In the worst case, This can take 15 minutes of waiting, because that's the import frequency into QUA. This frequency is not increased because of fear of overlaps when one big transports takes longer than the interval of 15 minutes. Is this a reasonable fear? Please share your experience for this too.

If I'm lucky and there is usable test data in the DEV system, I still cannot directly set break-points in ADT, because they are set in client 100 and test data is in 101. So I need to logon to client 101 in order to test.

This is very inefficient and frustrating. How is your setup, how do you deal with this?

SAP's recommendations I have found so far are also not unanimously. Sometimes, SAP recommends a "golden client", but in other online resources it's called an outdated concept.

During our transformation from R/3 to S/4, our colleagues tried to merge client 100 and 101 into one client. But there were some hurdles that apparently could not be overcome - I was not involved in the details, but the client seemed to be "not consistent".

Unit Tests would be a solution, but are not feasible with all our 20+ year old legacy code and without dedicated time to build them.

Looking forward to your experiences!

entry.title: Re: UI asset listing different from REST API listing
entry.content: The answer is that the REST API only returns deployed views and analytic models (see here).

entry.title: Extensibility in Sales and Service V2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have documented the overview of the Extensibility concept that I've come across in my Professional journey in Sales and Service V2.

Customization:

Customization is to extend/modify the capabilities of the existing product to meet specific needs of the Business.

Customization allows businesses to tailor the product or service to fit their exact needs, making it more relevant, efficient, and effective for their operations.

Sales and Service Cloud V2 offers multiple customization options:

1. Integrate: Version 2 can integrate with other solutions (SAP or non-SAP) via multiple approaches:

  • Mashups
  • Rest APIs
  • Event Notifications

2. Theming Support:

With SAP Sales and Service Version 2 administrators can customize the UI by applying different themes.

3.Extensibility Options:

V2 offers In App Extensibility which allows the customers to extend the software platform.

In Version 2, Administrators can enhance the basic functionality using the below 3 features.

  • Extension Fields
  • Validation Rules
  • Determination Rules

This blog will provide an overview on couple of extensibility options provided by SAP in Sales and Service Version 2.

Extension fields:

Extension Fields are additional fields that can be added by Administrators which is used to store data for particular use cases in addition to what is available in the existing solution.

Extension fields can be added in Sales Cloud V2 through the following steps:

Navigate to Settings

Open Extensibility Administration from All settings. Extensibility Administration is one stop place to extend standard entities.

All the Entities are available in the left panel and are grouped via services. Only certain Entities are enabled and can be extended with new fields. 

Check the Extendable checkbox to view only the extendable fields and select the Entity for which the extension field needs to be added . Clicking on New(+) icon will bring a quick create screen where Label, data type and data format of an extension field is maintained.

In Field Attributes tab you can choose if the field added needs to be updatable, Required, searchable and sortable.

Once the attributes are chosen and saved, navigate to the Workcenter where the field needs to be added. On clicking the user icon select Start Adaptation

Hover on the section where the field needs to be added. Select the edit option that would be displayed.

Navigate to Add from list on top right corner of the edit menu that appears. Search for extensions node in the search bar and drill down inside the structure to view the list of available extension fields.

 

New section and new tabs can also be added by hovering over the section/tabs and selecting Add section/Add tab.

Key users can also Hide, remove or change the sequence of the fields.

Validation Rules:

Validations help administrators to implement a custom logic where we can prevent a save or issue a warning message to users during save based on certain conditions. Key users can create their own custom checks/conditions on top of SAP standard validations.

Navigate to Extensibility Administration and drill down to the service and entity. Click on Validation tab and select the create Validation icon.

In the validation editor tab there are 3 sections:

  1. Header: Specify the validation name and description here.
  2. Condition: Set the desired conditions using a flow-based visual condition editor.
  3. Action: Specify an error or warning message based on the conditions defined in the condition block.

In the below sample, I've taken a use case where a warning message is issued when the case escalation status is changed to Escalated.

 

Hope this blog has helped in providing an overview of the Extensibility concept. This is my first blog so please provide your valuable feedback and comments to improve my knowledge.

entry.title: Market Process Management For Utilities - An introduction
entry.content:
WHAT IS IT ?

SAP Market Process Management For Utilities is an Add-On to SAP S/4HANA Utilities condensing the experience from 120+ international customer projects. It allows to efficiently model, execute and monitor business & market processes, including the required message handling for communication with other systems (market partners).  It includes additional features to accelerate your implementation project by providing reusable framework functionality as well as additional data objects and attributes.

This product helps you to:

  • Consistenly model, run and monitor all your processes within the same framework
  • Smoothly manage regulatory changes through process versioning in design and runtime
  • Detect master data inconsistencies and to take actions for these ones
  • Handle exceptions with low effort

Market Process Management for Utilities is powered by Application Process Engine and is the next iteration on an existing and proven framework (IDE/IDEX-GC). And it becomes even better because it is part of the SAP Utilities Core Offering.

WHAT ABOUT LOCALIZATION (make it country specific) ?

By using the international version of Market Process Management for Utilities it is possible to add country specific content. Based on our deep dive for the Belgian Market Supply Processes we have come to the following conclusion:

  • 70% re-use of standard SAP functionalities
    • Message Mapping & Validation Framework
    • Process Flow Framework (versioning, steps, checks, ...)
    • Transfer Document functionalities (Odata, Mass Processing, ...)
    • Standard objects to create, update, ... the IS-U data model
    • International Market Reporting (CDS views, Fiori Apps, ...)
  • 30% Country specific content 
    • Communication Protocols with the clearing house(s)
    • Message mappings / validations
    • Country specific process flows modelization
    • Set-up of the country specific data model within the IS-U data model
    • Country specific Market Reporting

Thanks to the set-up of the framework it is also possible to handle multiple countries within the same S/4HANA system.

THE S/4HANA FUNCTIONAL BLOCKS

Curious to hear more about SAP MPM ?

  • Don´t hesitate to post your questions in the comments section of this blog
  • Discover the interesting content about SAP MPM on the SAP help portal
  • Contact me for a virtual coffee or tea

And of course I am also curious to read your thoughts about MPM and your experience with it. So don´t hesitate to share them.

entry.title: How to Update Zip-codes using Service Order(SO) numbers in S4.
entry.content:
Hi Sapiens,

This Blog talks about How to Update Zip-codes using Service Order(SO) numbers in S4.

In-order to update Zip-codes using Service orders we need to find the premise ID’s for the SO’s. Let me show to how to fins premise Id’s first and later we can update the Zip-codes.

Below are the steps that we need to follow to do the process:

  1. Login into S4 ISU and enter T-code ES32 which is for installation.

2.After you get the above screen, press Ctrl+F You will get the below screen

3.Once you get the above screen go to 3rd Tab Other search criteria and give the SO number and click on continue.

4. Once you click on continue you will get the premise number

5. Copy the premise number. Now do the premise Replication from S4 to C4.

6. Go to ES62 Premise T-code to get the connection object details/number.

7. Copy the Connection object details and Go to T-code ZDV_TMD_REPL and give Connection Object details and execute.

8. Now you will get the window saying Job has been executed successfully.

9. Go to C4 and see if the Zip-Codes has been updated successfully in C4.

 

Thanks,

Aakanksha Tippani.

entry.title: Activate SNC on AS ABAP
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to activate the SNC on my ABAP server.

I am trying to create the PSE on Tcode STRUST, unfortunately I can not do it because the node 'SNC SAPcryptolib'  prevent to create a PSE.

 

Can you please advise what should I do?

thank you.

entry.title: Git Repository for SAP CPI IFlows
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement of backup all CPI Iflows from current production Tenant and import these backup Iflows into new CPI Production tenant in case of any Disaster recovery (new CPI tenant will be available during or after DR only).

Is there any way of doing it automatically.

Can you please provide some inputs on how to achieve it. 

Thanks in advance,

Venn

entry.title: Re: Deletion of material groups
entry.content:
Deletion of material groups - created from customer - can be requested by pre-approved expert configuration. Please see details of the procedure in SAP Activate Roadmap - Request Expert Configuration.

SAP delivered content cannot be deleted.

entry.title: Re: How to switch Measure Based Locks easily ?
entry.content:
Hi erkanakin1, 

   Though measure is not part of context definition in calendar data lock task, but in multi action data locking step, measure is available. You may explore the option to use multi action instead. In addition, you may also schedule a multi action task from calendar. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: print out column names
entry.content:
This time just a few comments from me:

even if it works here, fieldname_tab is not the correct type for sutun_type,
take a look at the documentation of sy-tabix,
you can find the field length also in  lr_structdescr->components,
it looks like that there's no need for sutun_basliklari and sutun_type. Just use lr_structdescr->components in your loop
If you don't use cl_demo_output=>write_data, you don't need cl_demo_output=>display( )  here.

entry.title: Re: Program to add product/locations to models
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

Indirectly this topic can be addressed with a leverage of this SAP Note (details below):

854181 - Product: Model assignment of products - SAP for Me

---

Thanks and best regards,

Simon S.

entry.title: Placing ACH file to AL11 when payment is ran in F110
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to place the ACH file to AL11 when Automatic payment ran thru F110, I created the Event 21 for the payment medium format and created a Z FM ZFI_PAYMEDIUM_SAMPLE_21 and assigned in the event modules.

But, I'm not getting the complete data in the table when event 21 is triggered. Can you guys suggest me to achieve this?

 

Thank You,

Venu.

entry.title: Re: Activate SNC on AS ABAP
entry.content: you may want to update the tags as this doesn't fall under the tag "SAP Replication Server"; did you by any chance mean 'SAP Landscape Transformation replication server'?

entry.title: Re: I am looking for a report for Order Intake and Revenue.
entry.content:
Hi Evans,

not quite sure, but I guess you are referring to sales orders. Please see scope item 1BS - Sales Analytics. Various apps are available for monitoring backlog, open orders, revenue etc.

 

Also in SAP Help the reporting options are described.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/e43f9756c5708251e10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Introducing fileUploadXLS: The Ultimate Excel Custom Widget for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
fileUploadXLS custom widget is designed to streamline the process of handling Excel or XLS files within SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), enabling users to easily retrieve file data in various formats such as JSON, raw text, and more.

Key Features

  • File Format Flexibility: Supports Excel and XLS files, ensuring compatibility with common data sources.
  • Data Retrieval: Easily retrieve file data in JSON, raw text, or other formats.
  • Filtering Capabilities: Apply filters to records based on value or character presence.
  • Data Hierarchy: Set hierarchical structures for better data organization.

Installation Guide

Watch Full Guidance on YouTube As well

To integrate the fileUploadXLS widget into your SAP application, follow these simple steps:

  1. Download the Widget:

    Click the link above to download the fileUploadXLS.json file.

    Or Download it from Github : https://github.com/SAP-Custom-Widget/fileUploadXLS

  2. Add to SAC Portal:

    • Navigate to your SAC Portal.
    • Select "Analytic Application" from the left sidebar.
    • Go to the "Custom Widget" tab.
    • Click the "+" icon on the right side and upload the fileUploadXLS.json file you downloaded.

  3. Start Using the Widget:

    • Once uploaded, the widget is ready to use in your applications.

Methods Overview

The widget offers a range of methods to interact with your data:

Set Methods

MethodParameter TypeDescription
setHierarchyStructure(hierarchy)Selection/Object arraySets the hierarchical structure for the data.
setFilterByValue(filterByValue)Selection/Object arrayApplies a filter to records based on a constant value.
setFilterByContains(filterByContains)Selection/Object arrayApplies a filter to records based on a value that contains a specific character.

Get Methods

MethodReturn TypeDescription
getDataAsJson()Selection/Object arrayRetrieves uploaded data in JSON/Selection/Object format.
getDataAsRaw()stringRetrieves uploaded data in raw string format.
getTotalRecordsCount()integerGets the total count of records.
getHeaders()string[] arrayGets the headers of uploaded data as an array.

I hope you find the SAC-P Custom Widget: fileUploadXLS useful for your projects. Your feedback and suggestions are always welcome, as they help in making this tool even better. Thank you for your support, and happy data handling!

Conclusion

The SAC-P Custom Widget: fileUploadXLS is a powerful addition to SAP Analytics Cloud, designed to simplify the process of working with Excel and XLS files. With its robust data retrieval capabilities and flexible filtering options, it enhances your ability to manage and manipulate data efficiently. By following the easy installation steps, you can quickly integrate this widget into your applications and start leveraging its features immediately.

entry.title: Re: Unable to load shared library '/home/site/wwwroot/libadonetHDB.dll' or one of its dependencies.
entry.content: Thank you very much!!! With the new DLL it works!

entry.title: Re: reCAP, UI5con, ABAPconf 2024 - Community Run
entry.content: Great initiative! Thank you for organizing it!

entry.title: Re: Efficiency in development: Test Data in development client
entry.content:
In my first job working with SAP the company only had one client for each level in the landscape, and any reference to a "golden" client was for the reference client 000.  Development tasks were generally very efficient because there was always usable data for conducting the necessary unit tests.  When I had come to my new company they had an ECC environment also with a single client in each level, but the SI had suggested a golden client for the S4 transformation (at the time I had never heard of it in this type of arrangement).  What I observed immediately is that any development task became slower, especially if it required any additional tinkering with customizing... "Let me SCC1 that over".

The general argument that I would hear is that if we have a "golden" client we can always reverse customizing if data doesn't exist, but it becomes a problem otherwise.  Not a particularly well thought out argument because anything can be reversed in a development system, even if it may take a little extra time.  Seems to be more a fallback crutch so folks can fudge around or experiment in customizing instead of knowing what they need to configure.  There's a place for that and it's called a sandbox which can be blasted by a refresh at any time.  

Regarding being able to change anything in a development system - we had an instance of needing to update a wildcard certificate in STRUST in production because all certificate based communication was failing when our old certificate expired.  The problem was that a password had been entered into the .pfx by our previous SI and not recorded anywhere, and we are not able to contact the necessary person for several hours.  A short stint in the debugger and that problem was cleared without needing to open a ticket with SAP.

Fast forward a couple of years and the archaic concept of a "golden" client has been incinerated in our landscape.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: How to switch Measure Based Locks easily ?
entry.content: Thanks William!

entry.title: Re: print out column names
entry.content:
Yes, I examined it after I asked you. Since it is a table, it is enough to return in the loop. thank you again.

LOOP AT sutun_basliklari INTO DATA(ls_st).

  WRITE: / index, ' ', ls_st, ' ', sutun_type[ index ], ' Length: ', lr_structdescr->components[ index ]-length.
  index = index + 1.

ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content: HI William, how is the parameter %PERIOD% defined. As a member for the dimension = Date or as a Number BR Marm

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: @Attila, I believe your solution worked; disabling docker desktop Resource Saver.  Over almost all day, SAP Logon works.  Thanks.

entry.title: Change logic of a filter in SAC from "OR" to "AND"
entry.content:
Hi All, I was wondering if there is a way to change the logic within a single SAC filter. My current understanding is that by default the "OR" logic is applied to a single filter within SAC. My questions:

1. How can I change the logic from the current "OR" logic to "AND" logic?

2. Is it possible to give the end-user an option to choose between what logic they would like to use in that filter - "OR" or "AND"? How would I go about this?

Thanks very much for your support!

entry.title: Re: Develop with Joule in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
It looks the replay videos are only accessible to partners and not to customers.
Is it done on purpose ?

entry.title: Re: How to add PO Item Custom Field for Mass Change of PO
entry.content:
Dear Sridhar

Thank you for your question.

Maybe the following information on Adapt and Extend Functionality of Apps (Extensibility)  may help you to let you add the PO item level custom field to the app Mass Changes to Purchase Orders.

I would like to know how did you add this custom field to the PO item level. Maybe you have to do the same process in the app of Mass changes of PO.

Please let us know if this could help you. Otherwise please come back to us telling with more details what you already have done to add this custom field in the app Mass Changes to Purchase Order.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP subaccount trial Login Error
entry.content:
Hi @kaidehmann ,

I just deleted my subaccount in the #BTP trial account and created a new subaccount. Now I can log in to the ABAP cloud project through the #Eclipse after deleting(old) and creating(new) the trial's subaccount. 

Thanks for the solution.

Best wishes,

Aravindhan

entry.title: Re: Mass update of Mtrl Master fields using MM17, (differ...
entry.content:
Hi, 

I think it's possible to do what you need by MM17, without creating an LSMW.

You should use the button I put in evidence in the screenshot I attached to this post. By that button, you have to upload a text file containing:

- the key fields for the table you want to update in MM17 (in my case it's MARM), so in my file I have the first column for MATNR and the second for MEINH

- the fields of the table that you want to update (in my case it's MARM-UMREN). Here, every material can have, at the limit, a different value of UMREN with respect to the others.

Uploading that file, I will have the ALV grid in MM17 (I mean the list I circled in red in the other picture I attach here) populated with the entire list of values that I want to be written in material masters.

I hope this can help someone.

Best regards

entry.title: SAP IBP Excel Add-in ; Customization of the ribbon
entry.content:
Hello experts,
is it possible to hide the ribbon within the IBP Excel Add-In?
With the help of the app "Maintain Business Roles" I was able to reduce the authorization to the following tabs:

The tabs "Data Input", "Alerts", "Tasks" and "About" are fine and can remain as they are.

Unfortunately, I have not found a way to edit the "Planning View" ribbon.

Can you please tell me if such a restriction is possible and how to set it? (possibly only via parts of the ribbon (Workbook Filter, Worksheet Filter, Edit View,..)

Thank you very much!

entry.title: FRUN - System Analysis - Custom Page
entry.content:
we are trying to create a custom page in the System Analysis application of Focused Run. If we add here the Metric "ABAP Message Server Http Availability" the x and the y axis has default labels. The Y-Label is extremely long for this Metric -> ABAP Message Server Http Availability.

If we check this in the SAP Standard Page "ABAP Basis" of System Analysis the Y-Label is short = "availability" . How can we adjust it?  If you use the "Personalization" Option on the Custom Page for the Metric here is a field for Label, but the DEFAULT is not overwritten.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SPAD
entry.content:
Hi All

Does SAP Business One has SPAD?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: FRUN - System Analysis - Custom Page
entry.content:
It is possible to provide a custom metric name for a custom page, via the following steps:

  1. In the personalization area click "select metrics"
  2. In the second tab of the dialog "Selected" you see which metrics are selected for display
  3. The column "Custom Metric Name" allows to override the default name with a custom one
  4. Hit close to update the chart.

Overriding the default metric name even works on default pages temporarily. But for default pages this override is not persisted.

For further details if required, please check out this SAP Knowledge Based Article on the topic:
3470646 - How to edit the metric name of a custom page created in the System Analysis scenario - SAP Focused Run
https://me.sap.com/notes/3470646

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: Hi still (though it seems its deprec iated to use it nowadays), as you might have read, the object changes according to the doc type 'from' where the IDoc is sent out (for the IDoc created for the SO is BUS2032, the one for the PO IDoc is BUS2012, the one for the OBD IDoc is LIKP), but not when the IDoc is sent out from an IBD.

entry.title: Update Manager Position in Position Object
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We need to manually update Position Hierarchy when a manager is terminated, and we transfer direct reports in Termination activity (KBA-2796641).
I am trying to automate it using intelligent services- Change in Manager and Integration Center Job.
In Integration Center Job, there is no option to map Manager Position from Job information to Parent Position in Position (Source Entity is "EmpJob" and Target Entity "Position"). It is very high-level design only.

Kindly guide me on how to automatically update parent position in Position object for the mentioned scenario.

Thanks and Regards,
RG

entry.title: Getting error while adding STO based delivery to the shipment document.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am getting an error message while adding delivery to the shipment document using Tcode "VT01N". However, the same deliver is being processed with tcode "VT01". Please advise solution if anyone has faced the same issue. Thanks. LE (Logistics Execution) SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Re: Side effect after executing an unbound action - How t...
entry.content:
Hi,

This feature is provided with SAPUI5 1.122. You can find the related documentation here, in the ODATA V4 section.

entry.title: Unable to send Email with HTML layout using CL_BCS class via SAP Transportation Management
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to SAP Transportation Management. I am facing trouble while trying to send a formatted email (with HTML body) for Freight Order. 

So I have a formatted email body maintained in Smartfroms Text Module which looks like this:

Now for the sending email we have implemented the method /BOFU/IF_PPF_SERV_FOR_BO~COMPLETE_SEND which successfully triggers the mail communication. 

Following is the code mentioned in the method:

 

 METHOD /bofu/if_ppf_serv_for_bo~complete_send.

    DATA: lo_recipient TYPE REF TO cl_cam_address_bcs,
          lo_easy_email TYPE REF TO zcl_email,
          lt_emails     TYPE bcsy_smtpa,
          lt_body       TYPE bcsy_text,
          lv_template   TYPE sychar40,
          lt_note       TYPE bcsy_text.

    CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_print_helper=>get_tor_nodes
      EXPORTING
        it_key          = lt_keys
      IMPORTING
        et_root         = DATA(lt_root)
        et_item_tr      = DATA(lt_item_tr)
        et_party        = DATA(lt_party)
        et_docref       = DATA(lt_docref)
        et_docref_item  = DATA(lt_itemref)
        et_tor_add_info = DATA(lt_additional_info).

    CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_doc_flow_factory=>get_instance
      EXPORTING
        iv_bo_key   = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key
      RECEIVING
        ro_doc_flow = DATA(lo_doc_flow_ref).

    CALL METHOD lo_doc_flow_ref->get_doc_flow
      EXPORTING
        iv_direction         = 'A'
        iv_node_key          = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node-root
        it_key               = lt_keys
      CHANGING
        ct_doc_flow          = lt_root_table
        ct_doc_flow_relation = lt_root_table_relation.

    TRY.
        DATA(ls_root) = lt_root[ 1 ].
        DATA(ls_item) = lt_item_tr[ main_cargo_item = 'X' ].
        DATA(ls_item_tr) = lt_item_tr[ main_cargo_item = '' ].
      CATCH cx_sy_itab_line_not_found.
        EXIT.
    ENDTRY.

	** Other business Logic ommitted **

    CREATE OBJECT lo_easy_email.

    CASE is_ppf_act-ppf_action.
      WHEN 'ZMAIL'.

        TRY.
            lo_recipient = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address( i_address_string = "abc@def.com" ).

          CATCH cx_address_bcs.
        ENDTRY.
        io_send->add_recipient( i_recipient = lo_recipient ). " Recipient of Message

        ls_languages-langu1 = l_spras.
        ls_languages-langu2 = 'E'.

        lv_textname = 'Z_MAIL_BODY'.

        SELECT SINGLE COUNT(*) FROM stxfadm
                               WHERE formname   = lv_textname
                               AND   formtype = 'T'
                               AND   masterlang  = l_spras.

        REFRESH : lt_texts.
        CALL FUNCTION 'SSFRT_READ_TEXTMODULE'
          EXPORTING
            i_textmodule       = lv_textname
            i_languages        = ls_languages
          IMPORTING
*           O_LANGU            =
            o_text             = lt_texts
          EXCEPTIONS
            error              = 1
            language_not_found = 2
            OTHERS             = 3.
        IF sy-subrc <>  0.
*        RETCODE = 2.
        ELSE.

          LOOP AT lt_texts INTO DATA(ls_text).
		"Here The HTML body is with customer data.		
          ENDLOOP.

        ENDIF.

        c_length = i_length.

        CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_FTEXT'
          EXPORTING
           text      = body_str
          TABLES
            ftext_tab = lt_note.

        IF lt_note IS NOT INITIAL.
          TRY.
              io_send->send_request->setu_note( lt_note ). "The note is acting as the Email body
            CATCH cx_document_bcs cx_send_req_bcs.
          ENDTRY.
        ENDIF.

      ls_msg-msgv1 = ls_root-tor_id.
      SHIFT ls_msg-msgv1 LEFT DELETING LEADING '0'.
      DATA(lv_subj) = lo_easy_email->get_subj_from_kschl(
        iv_kschl = 'ZCON'
        iv_msgv1 = ls_msg-msgv1
        ).
      lv_subject = lv_subj.
      IF lv_subject IS NOT INITIAL.
        TRY.
            io_send->send_request->set_message_subject( lv_subject ).
          CATCH cx_document_bcs cx_send_req_bcs.
        ENDTRY.

      ENDIF.

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

 Now the Email is successfully triggered via the Freight order. But the first problem is we are seeing the Note along with the HTML tags:

Freight order-> Output Management tab:

And when we check the Email in SOST, the body is also coming with the HTML tags instead of the format.

Could anyone please help how can we send the formatted Email with PPF framework in SAP transportation management?

entry.title: Re: How to configure an “Expiration Alert” within an MDF Object and apply it retrospectively
entry.content:
@antoniovp, thanks for this blog! We have created the alerts in this way some years ago. Now with the new CS for CW, the creation of alerts is no longer working for us when we hire a CW. For changes on existing CW it still works. SAP sais the above is not the official way to set work order end date alerts up and sais we need to change our config (see the comment of renanbauerman above this comment).

I wanted to know if you run into the same issues now with the new CS setting. 

Thanks,
Linda

entry.title: Proration not working for separated case
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need help related to proration case not working for separated employees. However this is working for mid year joiners.

Assignment End date is not getting picked up correctly which is reading date as 31/12 despite of setting to display as Assignment date instead of programme date

Due to which proration is not working for separated case. Any clue? 

Pl suggest

 

Thanks

Ritanshi

entry.title: Entry of results in Scientific Notation format
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Entry of control results in "scientific notation" format, is it possible?

It is necessary to allow the entry of results in Scientific Notation format.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Entry of results in Scientific Notation format
entry.content:
Hi,

thank you for the details provided. Please read the relevant KBA in the topic:

3287437 - Not able to enter inspection result in exponential format like 2E 19 due to error 00088 - 'Input must be in the format ____'

Have a nice day,
SAP Support
​***
​Read and follow the 'SAP Community Rules of Engagement' at
​https://www.sap.com/community/about/rules-of-engagement.html

entry.title: Process order integration with DMC
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to integrate my Process order from S4 hana to the DMC, i only see the " Integrate Production Orders with a Manufacturing Execution System" for the discrete orders, i am not able to see such nodes for the Process order. 

can some one guide what am i missing here?

@ Manoelcoasta

Br,

DSK

 

SAP Digital Manufacturing  SAP Digital Manufacturing Insights

entry.title: How to add an attribute of different type in advance search of back office?
entry.content: I want to search for the customer's email within orders

entry.title: Re: Side effect after executing an unbound action - How t...
entry.content: thanks for the feedback time for a version switch 🙂

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report colour Printing
entry.content: Hi M Our Client is able to Print Preview Saved in PDF in colour and print to printer in colour from PDF

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA hangs
entry.content:
I saw some errors regarding the replication configuration.

The operating system where the HANA system is installed was configured according to SAP recommendations? Is the HANA system with the latest patch installed?

SAP have a tool to help process application logs that could help you: https://supportportal-pslogassistant-app.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/utilities/FileTypeList/index.html (Support Log Assistant)

entry.title: Cloud workflow release step getting unauthorized
entry.content:
Hi,

Cloud workflow while releasing getting unauthorized due to its reqaching the deafult client instead of taking

from the BTP Destinations client.

Please help.

 

Thanks,

Vamsi Krishna.

entry.title: Re: Activate SNC on AS ABAP
entry.content:
Hi dear,

This is in this SAP note:https://me.sap.com/notes/2440692

Use transaction SNCWIZARD to configure the SNC profile parameters and create or configure the SNC SAPCryptoLib PSE.An application server restart is required for the profile parameters to take effect.The SNC SAPCryptoLib PSE now must be signed by a Certification Authority (CA) using one of the following options:

SAP Single Sign-On SeTcure Login Server PKI
Certificate Life Cycle Management using SAP Single Sign-On 3.0 Secure Login Server
Enterprise or 3rd party PKI, e.g. Microsoft Active Directory CA, using the Replace Wizard in transaction STRUST. Please refer to SAP Note 2414090.
Starting from CommonCryptoLib version 8.5.11, SNC Client Encryption can be controlled by two new profile parameters. Please use SAP Note 2338952 for details.

ccl/snc/snc_client_encryption_allowed

Enable or disable SNC Client Encryption:

0 (disabled)
1 (enabled)

Default value: 1 (enabled)

ccl/snc/snc_client_encryption_require_x509

Force X.509 server authentication in SNC Client Encryption 2.0. If you are using SNC Client Encryption 1.0 and this option is enabled, the Kerberos solution will not work:

0 (disabled)
1 (enabled)

Default value: 0 (disabled)

 

Regards,

Solaliga David

entry.title: Some issues with the SuccessFactors Microsoft Teams integration
entry.content:
1. There is no real support structure in place
I am not sure if anyone else is experiencing the same issues, but there seems to be no real support structure in place for the MS Teams app. If your users have issues authenticating or issues with any of the services, it just tells the user to contact their administrator. This isn't a message we can customize, and as administrators, we can do very little to actually help the user. There are no FAQs in the implementation guide to help administrators understand the cause of basic issues. For example, we have users that cannot authenticate and get the message "The app is unavailable due to user mapping issues. Please contact your administrator for help." SAP support has been no help in resolving these issues. Our SAP reps have been no help in resolving these issues. I cannot enage my internal Teams or Azure beyond verifying my UPN without additional information. If I am seeing this as an issue in a small pilot group, how bad would it be for a global employee population? Would i be expected to raise tickets with SAP for each issue. We have also see an error that states "Unable to reach app. Please try again" Is this an issue with Teams, the bot service, azure, our network, Successfactors? How am i to know and resolve?
2. You cannot customize the list of actions shown to users, even if those actions are not available. Things like view my pay statements will be shown as an action, even if your system does not support that. There is a learn more button which for some reason redirects users to help.SAP.com, which none of our end users use
3. When you first download the app, you get a page with formatting errors

 


4. The EC quick actions don't let you bring in standard fields into some of their templates. If you use standard fields as filtering criteria, you may not be able to bring that filterable field into the change template.
5. Some of the rule types do not function
6. The quick actions also show up in the web app and you don't seem to be able to customize this. Imagine creating a quick action to view your cost center so that someone could do that in Teams without logging in, but then it clutters up this menu

Those last four are somewhat minor compared to the first two. Connecting the web application to a huge enterprise application like MS teams without having a predefined support structure and providing tools to easily fix common issues is a show stopper. Having the interaction with your end users having no customizable options, so that the app suggests services that cannot be completed. Is also a show stopper
What do other people think?

entry.title: Re: SBP installation fails miserably
entry.content:
Firstly, you don't need to have 2 ORACLE instances for SAP SOLMAN, you can have 2 schemas (one for ABAP and another for JAVA) on the same database.

Probably the error was related to not properly adjust the $ORACLE_HOME environment variables accordingly.

entry.title: DYNAMIC SEARCH help F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST not showing all the values from internal table
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I am creating a dynamic search help in Module Pool program. 

Under  AT SELECTION SCREEN ON VALUE REQUEST  Event, the below shown code is written.

 

I am trying to fetch all the records from custom table into t_ymcreq internal table in QAS. In debugging mode I can see that all the records (5512 records) from the database table is getting moved into internal table t_ymcreq. When I do F6 to get the popup as search help , the number of records I can see is only 5000 records in QAS .  IDEALLY as per my expectation , there should be all 5512 records should be shown in popup.

In Development 

everything is working fine in dev server. the table is haviing 3000+ records which are getting displayed as popup also. 

The issue is there only in QAS .

Is there any limit to the number of records to be shown in search help ?

entry.title: Re: How to Update Zip-codes using Service Order(SO) numbers in S4.
entry.content:
I believe the T-code "ZDV_TMD_REPL" is a Custom one, so this is not a Standard / General Transaction ... Please clarify if the T-code relates to a Custom or Stdrd. Application ...

Kind regards

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: Service entry sheet mass upload / Replacement of ML81...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you're using SES Lean Services, see link below for Excel upload functionality:

Example: Importing Service Entry Sheets from Microsoft Excel Files | SAP Help Portal

Otherwise, the t-code you mentioned is still available as Fiori application:

SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library (ondemand.com)

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: Hi, I 'misread' my partner profiles, the message type is in fact a different one for the PO and for the SO... nevertheless, I don't get why the WE57 finetuning I did for a specific variant message and function for my processing FM, as offered by SAP, isn't working. BR Yan

entry.title: APM/APMe Security groups details
entry.content:
Hello,

To monitor changes related to the roles and permissions of users. My goal is creating a security report that sums up the users/security groups and the detailed hierarchy of access permissions for Portals, Menus, Forms, Fields, Functions, Features , Widgets and Dashboards.

My objective is to obtain the required data by using a QB query that adheres to the data base entities. I'm having trouble comprehending the connections between these entities, particularly how they link together from Portals to Actions through menus and sub-menus and forms. Accurately mapping out which users and groups have access to specific elements within APM requires this understanding.

Here is what I have managed to decipher so far:

  • The entity UserSet includes users.
  • the entity SecGroup includes security groups.
  • the entity SecDet includes restricted security levels (UI elements):  Forms, Fields, Actions (Functions), Features, Widgets with its type of Access.
  • The entity MenuMetadata contains the list of Portals/menus/Menu tabs (without specifying the hierarchy)
  • The entity FormMetadata includes Forms and its relation ships with MenuMetadata entity.

Expected report format: Security Group | Portal | Menu | Sub Menu | Menu Tab | Form | Field | Function (Action) | Dashborad | Wdiget | Feature | Access ( Permission )

SAP's available web documentation (also APM Data Dictionary) primarily focuses on user-oriented information and configuration settings, and does not include details on the database schema.

Could you please provide guidance, detailed documentation, or example SQL queries that explain these relationships? Insights into the relevant database schema would be extremely helpful.

regards,

K.A

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: @yan3 because it's based on the message type as I had already noted in the answer as a read on table TBD14. Review the table in SE16 for your message type and you will find 'LIKP'.

entry.title: Re: DYNAMIC SEARCH help F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST not showing all the values from internal table
entry.content: There's a user setting for the maximum number of entries to be displayed, and the maximum is 5000. Search the Web, it has been discussed already.

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 1 (Prerequisites)
entry.content: Thank you, @DaliborPetrovic for this outstanding blog - a real pleasure reading it!

entry.title: Re: Export/Import Critical Authorizations for RSUSR008_009_NEW
entry.content:
Hi,

For information, the links are broken due to one of the SAP Community upgrades but the target pages have been archived by the Wayback Machine:

  • Z_USCRAUTH : https://web.archive.org/web/20230810060829/https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/download/attachments/491918787/Z_USCRAUTH.txt
  • SOS Excel sheet : https://web.archive.org/web/20230810060745/https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/download/attachments/491918787/SOS.XLS

entry.title: Azure user group replacement
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are having Azure as a Source System and IAS as the target system. We are replicating the user data from Azure Environment to the IAS. We use both the User and Group mapping transformation.

The job is working fine and we are able to fetch the data and write into the target system.

The challenge what I have is, I need to transform a specfic User Group to  a different value.

I have written the transformation code in my TARGET SYSTEM (IAS) as follows.

The two blocks are found under the User Group section. 

I have checked with the 'Validate' function and it is just converting it into UpperCase and replacement function doesn't function at all.

Does anyone have an idea about what i am missing here

Input : Abcd

Output : ABCD

Transformation

{
"sourcePath": "$.displayName",
"targetPath": "$.displayName",
"functions": [
{
"function": "replaceString",
"target": "Abcd",
"replacement": "SAP_CBC_CONSUMPTION_AUDITOR"
},
{
"function": "toUpperCaseString",
"locale": "en_EN"
}
]
}

 

{
"sourcePath": "$.displayName",
"targetPath": "$['urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:Group']['name']",
"scope": "createEntity",
"functions": [
{
"function": "replaceString",
"target": "Abcd",
"replacement": "SAP_CBC_CONSUMPTION_AUDITOR"
},
{
"function": "toUpperCaseString",
"locale": "en_EN"
}
]

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit Master Recipe template uses non-standard field codes
entry.content:
With all the other DMC templates, the technical field name used can be found in the relevant table (even if you have to hunt a bit for the table).  They are all there.  However, for this one pack, they are very different.  For example, for the Receipe Group, the field in the pack is MASTERRECIPEGROUP and not PLNNR in table PLKO, PLPO, etc.  When the data was originally loaded, a custom template was used (which in itself is odd, as it is the only one) which I have.  This contains the real codes, so for example PLNNR is used.  

So, has anyone actually used this standard Master Recipe template and, if so, did it work fine or was a huge amount of mapping needed?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: Hi, I understood, but why isn't WE57 helping?

entry.title: Re: Activate SNC on AS ABAP
entry.content:
Hello David,

thank you.

When launching the SNCWIZARD Tcode, i have an error message : 'SAPCRYPTOLIB too old'

I have the Sapcryptolib Version 8.5.36 which is not so old.

Any idea what I am missing ?

thanks for the support

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇺 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Melbourne, Australia)
entry.content: @Gurpreet_Jaspal - yes this CodeJam is part of the Mastering SAP TechX event and registration for the session is done via their website.

entry.title: Question on new email settings setup
entry.content:
A new SMT configuration option has been introduced. In the documentation (Email Settings | SAP Help Portal), there is a note regarding the "CPQ Legacy SMTP service" setting:

"It's crucial to note that this type of SMTP is not recommended, as there is a possibility that outgoing emails may not reach their intended recipients and it may be phased out in future updates."

Our question is is there already forseen version when this options will sunset? 

Our question is, is there a planned version for when this option will be sunset?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Question on new email settings setup
entry.content: The CPQ Version is not yet decided to discontinue the CPQ Legacy SMTP service.

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: @yan3 because TBD14 isn't part of the view that you see in WE57.

entry.title: Re: S/4 Output Management in Procurement: send to e-mail...
entry.content:
Dear rknienieder

Thank you for your question.

I think that as standard behavior, the role available to send the e-mail is for partner type LF.
However, we have other ways to send PO to other email recipients and this information is in the following documentation where can give you an idea how to determine email recipients in Output Parameter Determination:

1 -How to configure output parameter determination for purchase orders? 

2 -Output Parameter Determination - Determining Email Recipients 

3 -How to send purchase order output as an attachment in an email to recipient(s)? 

I hope those documents can help you to configure the e-mail the way you want.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Issues with CJ40 BAPI and Plan data not getting populated
entry.content:
Hello

Need a help as we are facing issues with the CJ40 update when using the BAPI "BAPI_COSTACTPLN_POSTPRIMCOST". 

Business requirement - To maintain the plan values at WBS level and Primary cost GL accounts

We receive a file with the WBS code and GL accounts along with usual amount, currency etc. When we try to process the file, the plan values gets correctly updated along with the GL codes but the field "Cost plan" is not updated which contains the totaled-up value of the lower level WBS. Our project profile contains only Annual values. 

Please suggest as we are totally lost here. We are not sure if another BAPI needs to be called to fill in the "Cost plan" field or something else. 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: Hi, for the outbound process you mean, because for the inbound one, WE57 is helping changing the object I believe.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Procurement – Service Procurement – Import of Model Product Specifications
entry.content:
Hi @H_Luetjohann (Hendrik),

The blog is very informative and detailed. Was there any resolution for materials with more than 18 characters? We have activated extended material number format and struggling to get MPS working with materials over 18 characters. Last resort is to raise an OSS. Any insights would be helpful. Thanks

Venkat

entry.title: The command "npm update --package-lock-only" fails with unresolved dependency
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am creating a sample CAPM Application by following the learning journey Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP.

At the the step "Exercise: Preparing the Application for Deployment", I am preparing application for manual deployment. However, the command "npm update --package-lock-only" gives following error.

Any ideas or suggestions to fix this are welcome.

Warm regards,

Amey

------

'Log files:
/home/user/.npm/_logs/2024-05-17T14_05_38_019Z-debug-0.log

# npm resolution error report

While resolving: risk-management@3.0.0
Found: @Sap/cds@7.2.0
node_modules/@sap/cds
@Sap/cds@"7.2.0" from the root project

Could not resolve dependency:
peer @Sap/cds@">=7.6" from @cap-js/sqlite@1.7.1
node_modules/@cap-js/sqlite
dev @cap-js/sqlite@"^1" from the root project

Fix the upstream dependency conflict, or retry
this command with --force or --legacy-peer-deps
to accept an incorrect (and potentially broken) dependency resolution.

entry.title: Re: Unable to send Email with HTML layout using CL_BCS class via SAP Transportation Management
entry.content: Where's the code for the creation of the document for the BCS request?

entry.content:
I've tried to search 'com.sap.security.api' jar file but couldn't get it.

Would you tell me where i can get com.sap.security.api jar package? otherwise, if anyone have  the  latest version of ' com.sap.security.api ' jar file please send me.

entry.title: Re: Cannot publish product - no link to API Business Hub...
entry.content: Have you resolved this? Having the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Create a Custom Copy of T-code VD05:
entry.content:
HI,

Please delete the TCODE And creat Again with Slecting program and selection Screen and save it then it work fine.

other possible solution: While making the Transaction in SE93 please select program with selection screen option.

Regards,

David Solaliga

entry.title: Re: Cannot publish product - no link to API Business Hub Enterprise
entry.content: Have you resolved this? Having the same issue.

entry.title: get Selected Items in UI from a table on execution of a custom action in capm fiori elements
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where I have defined a custom action on an Entity(Material) and on that action I am showing a pop up with value help. After selection of value help and execution of action I need the Selected Items from the Material table on which this action is defined.

Defining Action

type actionbtn : {
        ActionBtn : String;
    }
entity Material                      as projection on db.Material
        actions {
            // @CDS.odata.bindingparameter.collection
            action actionbtn(Template : actionbtn:ActionBtn) returns Material;
        };
 
service.js handler function
this.on('actionbtn', async req => {
        console.log(req.data);
Here I want the selected materials in Ui from the Material table
});

entry.title: Re: Using URL parameters in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi ,

i want to open an external URL on the same page without navigating to a new page. So i have added the URL in a html code and made that a hyperlink button as well in srcdoc property of Inline frame.
When i am clicking the button, the URL and the content is not loading and i am getting a white screen only. Do i need to add some logic to load the URL in same page ? please suggest.

entry.title: Re: DYNAMIC SEARCH help F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST not...
entry.content:
Hi,

MAXRECORDS is a standard field within SAP Structure DDSHF4CTRL that stores Restrict length of list information. Please check the value in the debugging once.

 

Thank You,

Venu

entry.title: Re: Unable to send Email with HTML layout using CL_BCS cl...
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

I tried using the following code to create the document instead of setting the note. But in this case, the email body is blank.

      IF lt_body IS NOT INITIAL.
          DATA(document) = cl_document_bcs=>create_document( i_type    = 'HTM' "'RAW'
                                                           i_text    = lt_note
                                                           i_length  = c_length
                                                           i_subject = CONV #( lv_subject ) ).
          TRY.
              io_send->send_request->setu_document( document ).
              io_send->send( i_with_error_screen = space ).
              CATCH cx_send_req_bcs. " BCS: Send Request Exceptions

            CATCH cx_document_bcs cx_send_req_bcs.
          ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.

 But setu_document( ) and setu_note( ) does not work together. I tried setting both together but it gives a dump.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Problem with REST sender
entry.content:
Hi dear,

Ensure the namespace is correct if your using FCC ,If the file is XML ensure the MT namespace and XML in the file has the same namespace.

Also, Please put one space in the description of ico/sender agreement. Reactiuvate it.

Take out the wsdl again and with that wsdl imported give user id and hit the endpoint.

It is if other problem, please see https://me.sap.com/notes/2628224/E

 

Regards,

David Solaliga

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content: As a member of dimension Date, user also select a month directly.

entry.title: Re: Process order integration with DMC
entry.content:
Hi, I suggest you start at: Process Order Integration.

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: SAP Workflow Approval via Mobile Phone
entry.content:
One thing we do A LOT  is spend time approving workflows for spend.  Whether that's purchase requisition, purchase order, or supplier invoice approval, we spend a lot of time clicking and reviewing in RISE S/4HANA PCE


We have been exploring options to get an SAP mobile app out there to accomplish this.

This would be a major efficiency for us and a technological advantage (should be automatic in today's age of AI), but what would SAP is the fastest route to accomplish this?

entry.title: Re: Evolution of ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Karl,

Thanks a lot for letting us going through this fantastic journey of ABAP.

I love ABAP!

I once stated in a social media article, that ABAP is the best programming language to build applications, because developer only need to focus on the business logic, do not need to care about anything about different operating system versions, different database providers, ABAP already done everything for us.

I also learned to use the very popular language outside the SAP world - Python - to write some personal stuff, but the experience is not so good: you need to write everything from the scratch, especially if you want to create a User Interface for it. You have to write several lines of code to create a Label, you have to write another several lines of code to create the input field beside the label... Ohhh, my god, it's very un-efficient, it's a waste of time to use it...

Thanks again, and thanks for your team, that bring ABAP to steampunk, to SAP BTP, and to the new era forever...

Long live ABAP and ABAPer...

Best Wishes,
Spring

entry.title: Please help to upvote this SAC idea request
entry.content:
Hello! Are you a user of SAP Analytics Cloud? Would you like to have the option to display currency signs and scales in SAP SAC charts (such as Bar Chart, Pie Chart – %, Values, and Signs)? 

There is a post on the customer influence page requesting this functionality from SAP Analytics Cloud development: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/232065 

The idea is being considered, but does not have enough votes to make it a priority (yet). Please consider this idea, and if it would be beneficial to your SAC practice, please vote it up!! Let's make those SAC reports look even better! Thanks!

entry.title: Audit LMS Administrators
entry.content: Is there a way to audit the LMS Administrators? Is there a report that details at least their last date of access?

entry.title: Automatic storage based on storage bin type
entry.content:
Hello SAP community, 

As part of the receiving process via Warehouse Management (WM), I'm having problems with the automatic allocation of bins based on a storage bin type (Carton, Pallet, etc...).

When the inbound delivery is modified with a view to creating the storage task, a carton HU is created, but when I create the warehouse task, the system is unable to determine the destination bin, even though it is set up so that only cartons can be stored there.

We want the system to automatically suggest locations bin that meet the storage criteria defined in advance.

Please find below my various settings :

CBC :

               1. Define Storage Bin Types

               2. Define HU Types for Each Storage Type

               3. Define HU Types for Each Storage Bin Type

               4. Assign Storage Bin Types to Storage Types

               5. Maintain Storage Types

SAP WM :

    1. Warehouse Monitor

              2. Change Inbound Deliveries

              3. Warehouse task

Could you help me to understand why SAP has not found a location and is placing the goods in the clarification zone by default ?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Fiori App for Manage Customer Materials using Developer Extensibility
entry.content: Hi ayechan, how did you solve it? it seems there is no way to update it via ABAP EML. Our idea is to use the OData API from abap but it's not the best solution

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP and Third-Party Cookies Deprecation
entry.content:
Hi @gregorw,

The testing guide is now available on the SAP BTP help portal page. Here's a direct link to it: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/preparing-and-testing-your-solution-for-third-party-cookie-deprecation

Best Regards,

Jessy

entry.title: Re: Change logic of a filter in SAC from "OR" to "AND"
entry.content: Would you please provide a concrete example of what do you want to achieve?

entry.title: Re: sap mdk case sensitive search in Object table search
entry.content:
First you should verify if your backend OData service supports tolower() and substringof() if a V2 service or tolower() and contains() for v4.  For an Online MDK connection we do not include tolower() in the search term by default since not all backends have implemented this function.

If your backend supports it can write a rule for your Object Table Target Query Options to customize the search string to include tolower to force the case insensitive search.

entry.title: Re: Deletion of material groups
entry.content: During the baseline activation Service, the Materials Groups have been deliverd by SAP Consultants. These MG's are no longer necessary and are causing confusion for the end users. Would there be an workaround for those, to avoid confusion for the end users?

entry.title: Re: Fetch mails from Outlook365 from SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi dear,

Please see blog, beacuse says regard your problem.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/mail-oauth-using-pi-po/ba-p/13542839

 

Also, I attach regard read mail from SAP Netwearver 

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sap/workloads/exchange-online-integration-sap-email-outbound

 

Regards,

Solaliga David

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content: David, thank you for being an excellent moderator and helping with the Digital Skills bootcamp! Enjoy your time off next week!

entry.title: Re: Show Total feature not working
entry.content: not seeing any screenshot

entry.title: Enhancement for availability check in material reservation (ME21)
entry.content:
Dears,
I have a requirement to set an error message when the stock is not available during reservation (MB21) for a certain plan, while for other plants/by default should be only warning message in that case.

That message I can set in standard configuration for Availability Check for Reservation (OMB1) -> Movement Type -> Dynamic avail. check: A-for warning, B-for error (Message no. M7181). It's OK, however it's for a movement type, globally. I need A-warning by default for my movement type, but B-error for the same movement type but while reservation for a certain plant (RESB-WERKS).

Is there any user exit or enhancement to do that?

Reagrds

entry.title: Product Bundle usage in Service contract SC1
entry.content:
Dear All,

In our Machining Solution Business, we have a Service Contract process that Our Contract is a bundle of several contract items.

Example: Platinum Contract have 1. Annual maintenance for 5 Years, Priority Service for next 2 years, Free Inspection every 3 months, 24/7 Support for next 1 year.

We have created this as a product bundle in SAP namely Service_Platinum.

Now, the requirement is to enter the Product Bundle as higher level item in Service contract and expectation is that the BOM should be exploded and show the sub items.

Relevant Configurations in Item Categories 'BOM Explosion' checked and Item Category determination is done accordingly to populate the Main item and Sub item. Still the Sub item is not auto populated.

So, Would like to check with you experts if the Product bundle in the Service contract is applicable for SC1 Contract type?

We did not consider Service Contract template since Our contracts are created from Solution Quotation. We cannot able link the Service contract template in Solution quotation for our Contract item. 

Request your guidance. Many thanks.

Girish

entry.title: Re: Employee Delegation in SAP Hybris Cloud for Customer
entry.content: What about the data? Is it gonna be intact or unchanged?

entry.title: Spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community - Kwiecień/Maj
entry.content:
Za nami już czwarte SAP Stammtisch w 2024 roku!

Po raz czwarty krótko przed Majowym weekendem udało nam się spotkać i omówić aktualne tematy SAP z naszego regionu. Spotkanie śmiało zaliczyć  można do bardzo udanych 👍 🔥 🍻

Jak zawsze w wyśmienitym towarzystwie, sporo nowości i ciekawych informacji na tematy rynkowe jak i samej grupy SAP Silesia a co za tym idzie duży impuls do działania a to wszystko w luźnej i przyjaznej atmosferze. 

Tak jak ustaliliśmy wcześniej, następne spotkanie już 26.06. 2024r. Zapisy pomogą w rezerwacji odpowiedniej wielkości stolika, więc daj znać, że będziesz: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 26.06.2024  
Planujemy tym razem spotkać się pod słońcem w okolicy Trzech Stawów. Szczegóły w linku powyżej. 

Korzystając z okazji dodam, że Majowe spotkanie się nie odbędzie z racji na sporą ilość dni wolnych i krótkich odstępów pomiędzy spotkaniami. 

Życzymy wszystkiego dobrego i zapraszamy do zapisywania się na czerwcowe spotkanie w znakomitym gronie :-)!
